scenarios.title: Internal-first: an internal match short-circuits the external check
scenarios.description: The ordering claim in the pitch is testable, so test it. If the org's own graph already answers the question, no external source is consulted at all.
preconditions: The graph holds a confirmed finding matching the hypothesis
steps: Call check_duplication with a hypothesis that matches an existing internal finding
Observe whether the Europe PMC client was invoked
expected: A verdict of 'matched' is returned, citing the internal finding
The external literature client was never called

scenarios.title: The save: an abandoned attempt is surfaced before a researcher repeats it
scenarios.description: This is the demo's punchline and the reason the product exists. A researcher asks a question adjacent to work a teammate already abandoned; the abandoned attempt comes back with its reason, so the researcher does not burn a week rediscovering the same dead end.
preconditions: F-093 (abandoned, stage-adjustment collapse) is seeded in the graph
steps: From a fresh session with no shared context, ask a question related to the signature F-093 tested
expected: F-093 is returned and clearly flagged as abandoned
Its reason — the effect collapsed after stage adjustment — is attached
It is not buried beneath confirmed findings merely for being abandoned

scenarios.title: The system never claims novelty
scenarios.description: Calibration is the credibility of the whole product. Claiming novelty is a claim the system cannot support, and one overclaim on stage costs more than any missing feature.
steps: Call check_duplication with a hypothesis that has no internal or external match
Inspect every user-facing string in the response
expected: The response says no prior work was found in the named sources
The sources actually searched are named
The word 'novel' does not appear anywhere in the output

scenarios.title: The demo survives a dead network
scenarios.description: The literature check hits a live external API during a live demo at 16:00. Assume the wifi fails, because it will.
preconditions: A literature query has been run once and cached into external_literature
expected: Cached results are returned from the graph store
No unhandled exception reaches the host
